Reference_title: The durum wheat annexin, TdAnn6, improves salt and osmotic stress tolerance in Arabidopsis via modulation of antioxidant machinery.
Description: Overexpression of TdAnn6 improved salt/osmotic stress tolerance in Arabidopsis. TdAnn6 overexpression positively regulates antioxidant activities in theTdAnn6 lines

Reference: Mergby, D., Hanin, M., & Saidi, M. N. (2021)
Reference_title: The durum wheat NAC transcription factor TtNAC2A enhances drought stress tolerance in Arabidopsis.
Description: TtNAC2A was highly expressed in developed seed and was induced under salt, drought and ABA treatment. TtNAC2A overexpression enhanced drought tolerance in transgenic Arabidopsis. TtNAC2A enhanced the expression of drought-responsive genes in transgenic Arabidopsis.

Reference_title: Overexpression of durum wheat NAC transcription factor TtNTL3A promotes early flowering and increases multiple stress tolerance in transgenic Arabidopsis.
Description: Transgenic Arabidopsis overexpressing TtNTL3A showed early flowering phenotype and higher tolerance to salt and drought stresses.
